title: Edit File
description: Create or modify a text file inside the active workspace directory. Every edit writes a checkpoint before changing the file.

content.description: Required for write and append operations. May be an empty string only when intentionally writing/appending no text.

old_text.description: Required for replace operations. The edit is rejected if this text is missing or ambiguous unless replace_all is true.

selection.summary: Create, append to, or replace text in a workspace-contained file with an automatic checkpoint.
selection.whenToUse: Use when the user asks the AI to modify project files. Change the working directory first to set the workspace root, including a mounted or remote project path.
selection.whenNotToUse: Do not use for reading files, editing paths outside the active workspace, binary files, or destructive directory operations.
